name: Elbmesh Manifest Contract Checks
summary: Checks for Elbmesh architecture manifest updates, separating currently implemented validation from target generated-artifact synchronization.

checks: Run or add manifest validation tests for any new Resource, Action, Event, Reaction, View, Query, or External Operation definition.
Confirm current validation covers duplicate Resource types, unknown references, duplicate External Operation types, and reaction graph cycles.
Confirm schema IDs and schema versions are preserved or intentionally changed with tests/docs.
Report generated binding or capability-doc regeneration as needed; do not claim it happened if no generator exists for the changed artifact.

items.text: Each Action references a declared Resource.
Each Event references a declared Resource.
Each Action emitted_event_types entry references a declared Event.
Each Action external_operation_types entry references a declared External Operation.
Each Reaction trigger Event and target Action are declared.
The v1 Reaction graph remains acyclic.
Generated docs/bindings/capability metadata are updated or a regeneration-needed note is recorded when the current repo lacks generation support.

blocks.description: Validation implementation and named ManifestValidationError codes.
Current tests proving manifest validation behavior.
Manifest editor responsibilities and preservation rules.
